message:
feat(tui): shared tick event batching, interior mutability, and layout artifact prevention

Introduce a per-tick shared event batch in TuiSharedState so screens can
ingest recent events without each re-locking/re-scanning the ring buffer.
All screen ingest_events() calls now use tick_events_since_limited().

Refactor detail_scroll, detail_view_mode, and json_tree_state to use
Cell/RefCell interior mutability in messages and search screens, allowing
&self methods where &mut self was unnecessarily required.

Replace unconditional full-screen clears in threads and search with
layout-phase-aware selective repaints to reduce overdraw and flashing
during rapid tab traversal. Threads screen now tracks layout phase
transitions and only clears when switching between Wide/Stacked/Compact.

Also includes rustfmt cleanup (line wrapping, import ordering) in
tui_markdown and messages, and a new estimate_wrapped_line_count helper
for accurate JSON tree soft-wrap height calculation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
